scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Require: 100rel RSeq: 1 Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1 2 IN IP4 172.16.10.110 s=- c=IN IP4 172.16.10.110 t=0 0 m=audio 11322 RTP/AVP 0 127 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:127 0-15

SIP/2.0 200 OK Via:[$1] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 INVITE Allow: INVITE, CANCEL, BYE, ACK, PRACK, SUBSCRIBE, NOTIFY, REFER, OPTIONS, INFO, PUBLISH, UPDATE Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uac Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1 2 IN IP4 172.16.10.110 s=- c=IN IP4 172.16.10.110 t=0 0 m=audio 11322 RTP/AVP 0 127 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:127 0-15

REFER sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip];tag=1 To: sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=1 [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 REFER [routes] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Refer-To: <sip:3001002@10.133.39.59:5076;transport=[transport];user=phone> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
